name: codex-flows-backend-author
description: Codex flow backend design and implementation guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Design and implement Codex flow backends.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows backend author installs guidance for implementing dispatch, run state, retries, local host execution, Convex orchestration, and external worker handoff. It does not install hooks or start a backend process.
defaultPrompt: Design a durable Codex flow backend.
